creator: makc@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sun, 06 Dec 2009 16:21:02 +0100, Heino Tiedemann wrote:
> Yes, to rebuild audio/libnjb was the solution. But strange: I
> installed sysutils/bsdadminscripts und used pkg_libchk to find old an
> stale libs. But pkg_libchk says "ok" to all...
pkg_libchk helps with resolving problems in shared libraries only. In your 
case something wrong was with libtool (*.la) files. Rebuilding dependencies 
usually helps, not only in this case :)
